svg.text: Email DisclaimerAll views or opinions expressed in this electronic message ("email") and any attachments are those of the sender of this email and do not necessarily reflect the views and opinions of the NFO. The information contained in this message and any attachments may be confidential or privileged and is intended for the use of the named recipient only, except where the sender specifically states otherwise. If you are not the intended recipient you may not copy, forward or deliver this message to anyone, and if you have received this message in error, you should return it to the sender, and delete the copy you received. You may not take any action based on information you have received in error. While all reasonable efforts have been taken to ensure that this email and any attachments are free from viruses and malware, you as the recipient are responsible for checking the email and any attachments. No responsibility shall be accepted by the NFO, their employees or agents for any virus or malware unwittingly transmitted to you. No email correspondence sent to the NFO shall be deemed to have been received until such time as the message has been responded to. An automatically generated reply, whether from a monitored or unmonitored inbox, shall not be deemed to constitute such a response.

National Financial Ombud Scheme South Africa NPC established on 1 March 2024. Registration Number 2023/162407/08. The National Financial Ombud Scheme South Africa (NFO) is recognised as an independent industry ombud scheme by the Ombud Council (OC/001/24).JHB office: 110 Oxford Road, Houghton Estate, Illovo, Johannesburg, 2198 CPT office: Claremont Central Building, 6th Floor, 6 Vineyard Road, Claremont, 7708Postal Address: P.O. Box 32334, Braamfontein, 2017 Tel: 0860 800 900 WhatsApp: 066 473 0157 Email: info@nfosa.co.za Web: www.nfosa.co.za
